creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
On Sun, 7 Nov 2010 22:29:12 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of sysutils/xfburn,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/152028 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/152028
> 

Sumbitter is having problems with the drive in question on both
FreeBSD and other Linux.  Another drive there works OK.  Suspected
hardware or config problem.

	-jr
